sub_modules.fp_operand_decode: Extracts sign, exponent, mantissa, and IEEE-754 operand class signals.
sub_modules.fp_special_cases: Handles NaN, infinity, zero, invalid, overflow-style infinity, and flush-to-zero special outputs.
sub_modules.fp_significand_multiply: Builds hidden-bit significands, computes biased exponent sum, and multiplies significands.
sub_modules.fp_normalize_round: Normalizes the significand product, applies rounding mode, packs the result, and generates overflow or underflow flags.
